name: dom-shot-extension
description: Chrome extension for inspector-like DOM selection and full-size element screenshot capture.

scripts.build: vite build --config vite.background.config.ts && vite build --config vite.content.config.ts && cp manifest.json dist/manifest.json
scripts.package: pnpm build && rm -f dom-shot-extension.zip && (cd dist && zip -r ../dom-shot-extension.zip .)
